name: Dark Tuner Catastrogue
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＤＴ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダークチューナー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カタストローグ
desc: You can reveal this card in your hand; immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 "Dark Tuner" monster. You can only use this effect of "Dark Tuner Catastrogue" once per turn. Once per turn, if you control this Normal Summoned/Set card: You can Tribute both this face-up card and 1 face-up non-Tuner with a lower Level, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck with a Level equal to the difference in Levels of those monsters (this is treated as a Synchro Summon), then you can destroy 1 card your opponent controls.
mnst_eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 "Dark Tuner" monster. You can only use this effect of "Dark Tuner Catastrogue" once per turn. Once per turn, if you control this Normal Summoned/Set card: You can Tribute both this face-up card and 1 face-up non-Tuner with a lower Level, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck with a Level equal to the difference in Levels of those monsters (this is treated as a Synchro Summon), then you can destroy 1 card your opponent controls.
eff: You can reveal this card in your hand; immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 "Dark Tuner" monster. You can only use this effect of "Dark Tuner Catastrogue" once per turn. Once per turn, if you control this Normal Summoned/Set card: You can Tribute both this face-up card and 1 face-up non-Tuner with a lower Level, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck with a Level equal to the difference in Levels of those monsters (this is treated as a Synchro Summon), then you can destroy 1 card your opponent controls.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Synchro Summon
